flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Maryland Institute College of Art are 30% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($45.2k vs $64.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Maryland Institute College of Art fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.2k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Maryland Institute College of Art fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (67.3% → 52.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Maryland Institute College of Art fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
